chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَسْأَلَةِ فِي الْقَبْرِ وَ مَنْ يُسْأَلُ وَ مَنْ لَا يُسْأَلُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 88 – The questioning in the grave, and the one who would be questioned and the one who would not be questioned

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/214)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/214)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَصْلُوبِ يُعَذَّبُ عَذَابَ الْقَبْرِ قَالَ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَأْمُرُ الْهَوَاءَ أَنْ يَضْغَطَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa from Yunus who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the crucified, whether he would be punished by the Punishment of the grave. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes. Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would Command the air to squeeze him’.
en.sarwar: 16. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus who has said the following: “I asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about one who dies because of being hanged, ’Is such a person punished in the form of the pressure of the grave?’ He replied, ’Yes, Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, sends the air to place huge pressures on him.’”
